title: citrus warburgina
intro: Citrus warburgina, also known as Philippine lime or calamansi, is a small, evergreen tree native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are found in its leaves, bark, and fruit. The health benefits of citrus warburgina include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, while its extracts have been shown to exhibit potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Citrus warburgina is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice, salve, or tincture.
